action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current year, total liquid funds, current timber market price, and the environmental stability index.

action_set_definitions.name: get_stand_data
action_set_definitions.description: Provides a list of all forest stands with their ID, tree species, and current biomass density.

action_set_definitions.name: get_policy_parameters
action_set_definitions.description: Returns the exact values for the High-Conservation subsidy, the Carbon Reversal penalty, and the cost required to increase the stability index by 0.01.

action_set_definitions.name: harvest_timber
action_set_definitions.description: Harvests biomass from a stand. Increases funds based on market price and volume, but reduces biomass and stability index.

stand_id.description: ID of the stand to harvest.

action_set_definitions.name: invest_in_restoration
action_set_definitions.description: Spends capital to increase the environmental stability index.

amount.description: Amount of funds to spend on stability improvement.

action_set_definitions.name: next_year
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the simulation to the next year, applying tree growth, subsidies, and penalties.

state_description.stands: A collection of forest parcels indexed by ID, containing tree species, age, and biomass density.
state_description.current_year: The current year of the simulation timeline.
state_description.available_funds: The liquid capital available for replanting and maintenance operations.
state_description.market_price_per_m3: The current market selling price for harvested timber.
state_description.environmental_stability_index: A score from 0.0 to 1.0 representing the ecological health of the managed area.
